_comment: Per-file LOC ceilings for files currently exceeding the global budgets in lint-locs.mjs. Each entry is a documented exception with a target for future decomposition. CI fails if a file in this list grows BEYOND its ceiling. New files must stay under the global budget (1500 LOC for src/pages, 500 LOC for top-level api/*.js).

exceptions.note: Reduced from 5,105 LOC in Sprint 2.3 (panels extracted). Further reduction possible by extracting LensScenarioRow, RevenueProjectionSection, SolarCostLineagePanel, and the page-level form state into a useLensRequest hook. Target ceiling: 1,500.
Reduced from 4,379 LOC in Sprint 2.4 (cards extracted). Remaining bulk: WeeklySummaryCard + EmptyStateOnboarding + the LibraryContent page component itself. Target ceiling: 1,500.
Reduced from 3,425 LOC in Sprint 2.5 (tabs extracted). ComparableDealsTab, IXQueueTab, StagingTab, TestNotificationsTab still inline (their state is interlinked). Target ceiling: 1,500.
